questions.question: Laser hair removal mein 'laser' ka full form kya hai?

options.A: Light Amplification by Stimulated Emission of Radiation
options.B: Light Application for Skin and Energy Reduction
options.C: Low-frequency Amplitude for Skin Enhancement Result
options.D: Luminous Absorption for Stimulated Energy Release

questions.explanation: Laser ka full form Light Amplification by Stimulated Emission of Radiation hota hai, jo is technology ka core principle hai.

questions.question: LHR treatment mein primary target kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Laser hair removal mein laser light hair follicle ke melanin (pigment) ko target karti hai, jisse heat generate hoti hai aur follicle damage hota hai.

questions.question: Ek LHR technician ke liye sabse important safety precaution kya hai?
questions.explanation: Laser light aankhon ke liye harmful ho sakti hai, isliye technician aur client dono ko appropriate eye protection (goggles) pehna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: LHR procedure se pehle client ko kya advise karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: LHR se pehle client ko treatment area ko shave karne ki salaah di jaati hai, taaki laser energy seedhe follicle tak pahunche aur surface hair burn na ho.

questions.question: LHR mein kis principle ka use hota hai jisse hair follicle destroy hota hai?
questions.explanation: LHR Selective Photothermolysis ke principle par kaam karta hai, jismein laser light specific target (melanin) ko heat karti hai bina surrounding tissues ko nuksaan pahunchaye.

questions.question: LHR ke baad skin par redness ya swelling aana kitni der tak normal hai?
questions.explanation: Treatment ke baad halki redness (erythema) aur swelling (perifollicular edema) aana common hai, jo usually kuch ghanton se lekar 1-2 din tak theek ho jaata hai.

questions.question: LHR treatment kitne sessions mein complete hota hai?
questions.explanation: Hair growth cycle ke alag-alag phases hote hain, aur laser sirf anagen (growing) phase ke hairs par effective hota hai. Isliye, complete hair reduction ke liye multiple sessions ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: LHR machine ko operate karte samay technician ko kaun sa personal protective equipment (PPE) pehna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Laser light se aankhon ki protection sabse important hai, isliye safety goggles pehna mandatory hai. Gloves aur mask hygiene ke liye bhi important ho sakte hain, par goggles laser safety ke liye critical hain.

questions.question: LHR treatment ke liye ideal room setting kaisi honi chahiye?

options.C: Controlled lighting, well-ventilated aur restricted access

questions.explanation: Laser treatment room mein controlled lighting honi chahiye, proper ventilation honi chahiye laser fumes ke liye, aur access restricted hona chahiye taaki unauthorized persons enter na karein.

questions.question: LHR ke baad sun exposure se bachna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Hyperpigmentation (dark spots) ka risk badhta hai
options.C: Hair growth wapas aa sakti hai

questions.explanation: Treated skin sun ke prati zyada sensitive hoti hai. Sun exposure se hyperpigmentation (skin ka dark ho jaana) ka risk badh jaata hai.

questions.question: LHR se pehle client ki medical history lena kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf age pata karne ke liye
options.B: Contraindications aur potential side effects pata karne ke liye
options.C: Client ki financial status jaanne ke liye
options.D: Treatment plan ko complicated banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Medical history se hum client ki health conditions, allergies, medications, aur existing skin issues ke baare mein jaante hain, jo LHR ke liye contraindication ho sakte hain ya side effects ko affect kar sakte hain.

questions.question: LHR mein cooling mechanism ka kya role hai?

options.C: Skin ko protect karna aur pain kam karna

questions.explanation: Cooling mechanism skin ke upper layers ko protect karta hai overheating se, pain aur discomfort ko kam karta hai, aur side effects jaise burns ka risk reduce karta hai.

questions.question: LHR treatment ke liye kaun sa hair color least effective hota hai?
questions.explanation: Laser melanin ko target karta hai. White ya grey hairs mein melanin ki kami hoti hai ya bilkul nahi hota, isliye laser un par effective nahi hota.

questions.question: LHR ke liye training aur certification kyun important hai?

options.B: Client safety aur effective treatment provide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper training aur certification ensure karta hai ki technician ko laser equipment ki sahi knowledge ho, safety protocols ka paalan kare, aur client ko safe aur effective results de sake.

questions.question: LHR treatment ke dauraan client ko kis tarah ka sensation feel ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Client ko laser pulse ke dauraan halki si चुभन (prickling), garmi, ya rubber band snapping jaisa sensation feel ho sakta hai, jo normal hai.

questions.question: Agar client LHR treatment se pehle waxing ya plucking kar le, toh kya hoga?
questions.explanation: Waxing ya plucking se hair follicle se hair shaft nikal jaata hai. Laser ko target karne ke liye hair shaft mein melanin ki zaroorat hoti hai. Agar hair shaft nahi hoga, toh laser energy follicle tak nahi pahunchegi aur treatment ineffective hoga.

questions.question: LHR ke baad skin ko soothe karne ke liye kya apply karna chahiye?

options.C: Aloe vera gel ya soothing cream

questions.explanation: Aloe vera gel ya koi soothing, non-irritating cream redness aur discomfort ko kam karne mein madad karti hai aur skin ko hydrate rakhti hai.

questions.question: Hair ka growth cycle kitne main phases mein divide hota hai?
questions.explanation: Hair growth cycle ke teen main phases hote hain: Anagen (growing), Catagen (transition), aur Telogen (resting).

questions.question: LHR treatment kis phase ke hair par sabse effective hota hai?
questions.explanation: Anagen phase mein hair follicle mein sabse zyada melanin hota hai aur hair root skin se attached hoti hai, jisse laser energy ko target karna aur follicle ko destroy karna sabse effective hota hai.

questions.question: Skin mein melanin kaun se cells produce karte hain?
questions.explanation: Melanocytes cells epidermis mein paye jaate hain aur melanin pigment produce karte hain, jo skin aur hair ko color deta hai.

questions.question: Fitzpatrick Skin Type Scale kya measure karta hai?

options.B: Skin ki sensitivity sun exposure ke prati

questions.explanation: Fitzpatrick Skin Type Scale skin ke pigment content aur sun exposure ke prati uski reaction ko categorize karta hai, jo LHR settings adjust karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Darker skin types (Fitzpatrick V-VI) par LHR karte samay kya precaution lena chahiye?

options.B: Longer pulse durations aur lower fluence use karein

questions.explanation: Darker skin mein zyada melanin hota hai, jo laser energy ko absorb kar sakta hai aur burns ya hyperpigmentation ka risk badha sakta hai. Isliye, longer pulse durations aur lower fluence ke saath Nd:YAG jaise lasers ka use kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Hair shaft ka kaun sa part skin ke andar hota hai?
questions.explanation: Hair root hair shaft ka woh part hai jo skin ke andar, follicle ke bheetar hota hai. Yahi woh area hai jahan cells grow karte hain aur hair banta hai.

questions.question: Vellus hair aur Terminal hair mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Vellus hair zyada dark hota hai
options.B: Terminal hair zyada fine aur light hota hai
options.C: Vellus hair fine aur light hota hai, jabki Terminal hair thick aur dark hota hai
options.D: Dono mein koi difference nahi hai

questions.explanation: Vellus hair body par मौजूद fine, light-colored hair hota hai (jaise peach fuzz), jabki Terminal hair thick, dark, aur coarse hair hota hai (jaise head, armpits, pubic area).

questions.question: Sebaceous glands ka kya function hai?

options.C: Sebum (oil) produce karna jo skin aur hair ko lubricate karta hai

questions.explanation: Sebaceous glands hair follicles ke paas hote hain aur sebum नामक oily substance produce karte hain jo skin aur hair ko moisturize aur protect karta hai.

questions.question: Epidermis skin ki kaun si layer hai?
questions.explanation: Epidermis skin ki sabse upari (outermost) layer hai, jo body ko environmental damage se protect karti hai.

questions.question: Hair follicle ki depth kis body part mein zyada hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Scalp hairs ke follicles body ke doosre parts ke मुकाबले zyada deep hote hain, jo LHR treatment ke dauraan energy penetration ko challenge kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Arrector Pili muscle ka kya function hai?
questions.explanation: Arrector Pili muscle hair follicle se attached hoti hai. Jab yeh contract karti hai, toh hair khada ho jaata hai, jise 'goosebumps' kehte hain.

questions.question: Eumelanin aur Pheomelanin mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Eumelanin dark pigment hai, Pheomelanin light/red pigment hai
options.C: Eumelanin light pigment hai, Pheomelanin dark pigment hai
options.D: Eumelanin skin mein hota hai, Pheomelanin hair mein

questions.explanation: Eumelanin black aur brown hair aur skin tone ke liye responsible hai, jabki Pheomelanin yellow aur red hair colors ke liye responsible hai.

questions.question: Dermis skin ki kaun si layer hai?
questions.explanation: Dermis epidermis ke theek neeche wali middle layer hai, jismein blood vessels, nerves, hair follicles, aur glands hote hain.

questions.question: Skin ka primary function kya hai?
questions.explanation: Skin ek complex organ hai jo protection, temperature regulation, sensation, aur vitamin D synthesis jaise kai important functions perform karti hai.

questions.question: Hair shaft ke teen layers ke naam kya hain?
questions.explanation: Hair shaft ki teen layers bahar se andar tak Cuticle, Cortex, aur Medulla hain.

questions.question: Hirsutism kya hai?

options.C: Women mein male-pattern excessive hair growth

questions.explanation: Hirsutism ek condition hai jismein women mein male-pattern areas (jaise face, chest, back) par excessive, coarse, aur dark hair growth hoti hai, jo hormonal imbalances se judee ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Papilla ka hair growth mein kya role hai?

options.C: Hair growth ke liye nutrients supply karna
options.D: Hair ko skin se bahar nikalna

questions.explanation: Dermal papilla hair follicle ke base par hota hai aur blood supply ke through nutrients provide karta hai jo hair growth ke liye essential hain.

questions.question: LHR mein sabse commonly use hone wale laser types kaun se hain?

options.B: Diode Laser, Alexandrite Laser, Nd:YAG Laser

questions.explanation: Diode, Alexandrite, aur Nd:YAG lasers hair removal ke liye sabse zyada use hote hain kyunki unki wavelength melanin ko effectively target karti hai.

questions.question: Alexandrite laser ki wavelength kya hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Alexandrite laser 755 nm wavelength par operate karta hai, jo lighter skin types (Fitzpatrick I-III) aur fine hair ke liye bahut effective hai.

questions.question: Darker skin types (Fitzpatrick IV-VI) ke liye kaun sa laser zyada safe aur effective hai?
questions.explanation: Nd:YAG laser ki 1064 nm wavelength skin mein zyada deep penetrate karti hai aur melanin absorption kam hoti hai, jisse darker skin types par burns ya hyperpigmentation ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: IPL (Intense Pulsed Light) aur Laser mein kya basic difference hai?

options.A: IPL ek laser hai, Laser nahi
options.B: IPL ek broad spectrum light hai, Laser single wavelength ki light hai
options.C: IPL sirf face par use hota hai, Laser body par

questions.explanation: IPL ek broad spectrum light source hai jo multiple wavelengths emit karta hai, jabki laser ek single, coherent wavelength ki light emit karta hai, making it more precise.

questions.question: Fluence kya hota hai LHR mein?
questions.explanation: Fluence laser energy ki density ko refer karta hai, jo per unit area (Joules per square centimeter - J/cm²) mein deliver ki jaati hai. Yeh treatment ki effectiveness ko determine karta hai.

questions.question: Pulse duration ka LHR mein kya importance hai?

options.C: Target tissue ko heat karne ka time

questions.explanation: Pulse duration woh time hai jiske liye laser light emit hoti hai. Correct pulse duration melanin ko effectively heat karti hai bina surrounding skin ko overheat kiye. Longer pulse durations darker skin ke liye safer hoti hain.

questions.question: Spot size kya represent karta hai?
questions.explanation: Spot size laser beam ka diameter hota hai. Bada spot size zyada area cover karta hai aur deep penetration provide karta hai, jisse treatment faster aur effective hota hai.

questions.question: Diode laser ki typical wavelength range kya hai?
questions.explanation: Diode lasers typically 800-810 nm wavelength par operate karte hain, jo hair removal ke liye bahut versatile aur effective mana jaata hai.

questions.question: LHR equipment ko clean aur disinfect kaise karna chahiye?

options.B: Alcohol-based wipes se har client ke baad

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye, laser handpiece aur contact surfaces ko har client ke baad appropriate disinfectant wipes se clean aur disinfect karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa laser type sabse deep penetration provide karta hai?
questions.explanation: Nd:YAG laser ki 1064 nm wavelength sabse lambi hoti hai, jisse yeh skin mein sabse deep penetrate karta hai aur deep-seated hair follicles ko target kar pata hai.

questions.question: LHR machine mein emergency stop button ka kya role hai?

options.B: Kisi bhi emergency situation mein laser ko instant off karna

questions.explanation: Emergency stop button ek critical safety feature hai jo kisi bhi unforeseen event ya malfunction ke case mein laser output ko turant band kar deta hai.

questions.question: Laser equipment maintenance mein kya shamil hai?
questions.explanation: Proper maintenance mein regular cleaning, cooling system ki checking, aur periodic professional calibration aur servicing shamil hai taaki machine safe aur effective rahe.

questions.question: Chromophore kya hota hai LHR mein?

options.B: Woh substance jo laser light ko absorb karta hai

questions.explanation: Chromophore woh specific substance (LHR mein melanin) hota hai jo laser light ki energy ko absorb karta hai aur heat mein convert karta hai, jisse target structure destroy hota hai.

questions.question: Fractional laser LHR ke liye use hota hai ya nahi?

options.B: Nahi, primarily skin resurfacing ke liye

questions.explanation: Fractional lasers primarily skin resurfacing, wrinkles, aur scars ke treatment ke liye use hote hain, na ki hair removal ke liye. LHR ke liye specific hair removal lasers hote hain.

questions.question: LHR machine ka handpiece kaise hold karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Handpiece ko firmly hold karna chahiye aur skin surface par perpendicular rakhna chahiye taaki laser energy evenly deliver ho aur effective treatment ho.

questions.question: Gel ka use LHR mein kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Skin ko clean karne ke liye
options.B: Laser light ki reflection kam karne aur cooling provide karne ke liye
options.C: Hair ko soft banane ke liye
options.D: Treatment area ko mark karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Clear ultrasound gel laser light ki reflection ko kam karta hai, jisse energy skin mein better penetrate karti hai, aur yeh skin ko cooling bhi provide karta hai.

questions.question: Laser ki wavelength jitni zyada hogi, uski penetration skin mein kaisi hogi?

options.D: Sirf skin type par depend karta hai

questions.explanation: Longer wavelengths (jaise Nd:YAG ka 1064 nm) skin mein zyada deep penetrate karti hain, jisse deep-seated hair follicles ko target karna possible hota hai aur darker skin types ke liye safer hota hai.

questions.question: Client consultation ka sabse pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Client ki medical history aur expectations jaanna

questions.explanation: Client ki comprehensive medical history lena aur unki expectations ko samajhna sabse important pehla step hai, taaki treatment plan suitable aur safe ho.

questions.question: Patch test karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Client ki skin type determine karne ke liye
options.B: Laser settings ki skin par reaction check karne ke liye
options.C: Hair thickness check karne ke liye
options.D: Client ko treatment ka preview dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Patch test ek small area par kiya jaata hai taaki dekha ja sake ki client ki skin laser settings par kaise react karti hai, aur adverse reactions ko avoid kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Agar client ne हाल ही में sun tanning karwayi ho, toh LHR treatment ka kya karein?
questions.explanation: Tanned skin mein melanin ka level badha hota hai, jisse laser energy skin absorb kar sakti hai aur burns ya hyperpigmentation ka high risk hota hai. Isliye treatment postpone karna chahiye.

questions.question: Consent form ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Client ko treatment ke risks, benefits, aur alternatives ke baare mein inform karna

questions.explanation: Consent form client ko treatment ke baare mein poori jaankari deta hai aur yeh confirm karta hai ki client ne sab kuch samajh liya hai aur apni marzi se treatment ke liye sehmat hai.

questions.question: LHR se pehle client ko kaun si medications ke baare mein batana zaroori hai?
questions.explanation: Kuch medications, jaise Retinoids aur certain antibiotics, skin ko photosensitive bana sakti hain, jisse laser treatment ke dauraan adverse reactions ka risk badh jaata hai.

questions.question: Client ki skin type aur hair type assess karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf client ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Correct laser type aur settings choose karne ke liye
options.C: Treatment duration determine karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Skin type (Fitzpatrick scale) aur hair type (color, thickness) ke anusaar hi laser machine aur uski settings (fluence, pulse duration) select ki jaati hain taaki treatment effective aur safe ho.

questions.question: LHR treatment se pehle client ko shaving ke alawa aur kya avoid karne ko kehna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Perfumes, self-tanners, aur harsh exfoliants skin ko irritate kar sakte hain aur laser treatment ke dauraan adverse reactions ka risk badha sakte hain.

questions.question: Pregnant women ke liye LHR treatment ka kya status hai?
questions.explanation: Pregnancy ek absolute contraindication hai LHR ke liye. Iske safety data ki kami hai aur hormonal changes ke kaaran results unpredictable ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Client ko LHR sessions ke beech mein hair removal ke liye kya suggest karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Sessions ke beech mein sirf shaving allow hai, kyunki waxing, plucking ya epilation hair follicle se hair ko nikal dete hain, jisse next laser session ineffective ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Client ko treatment area clean aur dry rakhne ke liye kyun kehna chahiye?

options.B: Laser light ki penetration improve karne ke liye
options.C: Side effects kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Clean aur dry skin hygiene maintain karti hai, laser light ki penetration ko disturb nahi karti, aur infection ya irritation jaise side effects ka risk kam karti hai.

questions.question: Hormonal imbalances (jaise PCOS) wale clients ke liye LHR ke results kaise ho sakte hain?

options.B: Kam effective ya zyada sessions ki zaroorat

questions.explanation: Hormonal imbalances ke kaaran naye hair growth stimulate ho sakti hai, jisse LHR ke results kam effective ho sakte hain aur zyada maintenance sessions ki zaroorat pad sakti hai.

questions.question: Client ko treatment se pehle jewelry aur metallic items remove karne ko kyun kehna chahiye?

options.B: Laser light ko reflect kar sakte hain ya heat up ho sakte hain
options.C: Machine ko damage kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Metallic items laser light ko reflect kar sakte hain, jisse burns ya eye injury ka risk hota hai, ya ve khud heat up ho sakte hain aur client ko discomfort de sakte hain.

questions.question: Client ko apni skin condition (jaise moles, tattoos) ke baare mein batana kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Laser in areas par apply nahi karna chahiye
options.C: Treatment plan change karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Moles aur tattoos mein high pigment hota hai, aur laser unhe target kar sakta hai, jisse burns, blistering, ya tattoo fade hone ka risk hota hai. In areas ko cover ya avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Photosensitizing herbs (jaise St. John's Wort) ka use karne wale client ke liye kya advice hai?

options.B: Treatment postpone karein aur herb use karna band karein
options.C: Sirf lower settings par treatment karein

questions.explanation: St. John's Wort jaise herbs skin ko photosensitive bana sakte hain. Isliye, treatment ko postpone karna aur herb ka use band karne ki salaah di jaati hai taaki adverse reactions se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Client ko post-care instructions detail mein dena kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf time pass karne ke liye
options.B: Optimal results ensure karne aur side effects kam karne ke liye
options.C: Next appointment book karne ke liye
options.D: Client ko busy rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Detailed post-care instructions (sun protection, soothing creams, avoiding hot showers) client ko skin recovery mein help karte hain, results ko optimize karte hain, aur complications ke risk ko reduce karte hain.

questions.question: Client ki age LHR treatment ke liye ek factor kyun hai?

options.A: Minor clients ko parental consent ki zaroorat hoti hai
options.B: Age ke saath hair growth pattern change hota hai
options.C: Older skin zyada fragile hoti hai

questions.explanation: Minor clients ko legal reasons se parental consent chahiye hota hai. Age ke saath hormonal changes hair growth ko affect karte hain. Older skin bhi delicate ho sakti hai, jisse settings adjust karne pad sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar client ko active skin infection ho, toh LHR ka kya karein?

options.C: Treatment postpone karein jab tak infection theek na ho

questions.explanation: Active skin infection (jaise herpes outbreak, bacterial infection) ke dauraan laser treatment karne se infection spread ho sakta hai ya condition bigad sakti hai. Isliye, treatment postpone karna chahiye.

questions.question: LHR procedure se pehle skin par kya apply karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Clear ultrasound gel laser light ki penetration ko enhance karta hai aur skin ko cooling provide karta hai, jisse treatment safe aur comfortable hota hai.

questions.question: LHR treatment mein overlapping technique ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Untreated spots avoid karna aur even coverage dena

questions.explanation: Slight overlapping se ensure hota hai ki koi bhi area untreated na rahe aur hair reduction evenly ho. Excessive overlapping se skin irritation ya burns ka risk ho sakta hai.

questions.question: LHR ke dauraan client ko pain kam karne ke liye kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Topical anesthetic cream apply karein ya cooling device use karein

questions.explanation: Topical anesthetic cream treatment se pehle apply karne se pain kam ho sakta hai. Cooling devices (jaise contact cooling, air cooling) bhi skin ko numb karke discomfort reduce karte hain.

questions.question: LHR ke baad skin care ke liye sabse important step kya hai?

options.B: Sunscreen apply karna aur sun exposure avoid karna

questions.explanation: Treated skin sun ke prati bahut sensitive hoti hai. Sunscreen lagana aur direct sun exposure se bachna hyperpigmentation aur other damage ko rokne ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: LHR treatment ke baad kitni der tak hot showers, saunas, aur strenuous exercise avoid karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Hot showers, saunas, aur intense exercise skin temperature ko badha sakte hain aur treated area mein irritation ya swelling badha sakte hain. Isliye, 24-48 ghante tak avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: LHR sessions ke beech ka ideal interval kitna hota hai?
questions.explanation: Sessions ke beech ka interval hair growth cycle par depend karta hai. Face par 4-6 hafte, body par 6-8 hafte ka interval common hai taaki anagen phase ke hairs ko target kiya ja sake.

questions.question: LHR ke baad hair 'shedding' kab shuru hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Treated hairs ko follicle se bahar nikalne mein kuch din lagte hain. Shedding usually treatment ke 5-14 din ke andar shuru hoti hai.

questions.question: LHR ke dauraan laser technician ko client ki skin reaction ko kaise monitor karna chahiye?

options.B: Visual observation (redness, swelling) aur client ke feedback se
options.C: Har 5 minute mein machine rok kar

questions.explanation: Technician ko skin par redness (erythema) aur perifollicular edema (halki swelling around hair follicles) jaise immediate reactions ko observe karna chahiye aur client ke discomfort level ka feedback lena chahiye.

questions.question: Agar treatment ke dauraan client ko excessive pain ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.C: Laser settings adjust karein (fluence kam karein ya cooling badhaein)

questions.explanation: Agar client ko zyada pain ho, toh settings ko adjust karna chahiye, jaise fluence kam karna ya cooling ko intensify karna. Agar pain fir bhi control na ho toh treatment stop kar dena chahiye.

questions.question: Treated area ko clean karne ke liye LHR ke baad kya use karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Treated skin sensitive hoti hai, isliye mild cleanser aur lukewarm water ka use karna chahiye. Harsh products avoid karne chahiye.

questions.question: LHR ke baad itchy skin ko kaise manage karein?

options.B: Antihistamine cream ya hydrocortisone cream apply karein

questions.explanation: Halki itching normal ho sakti hai. Iske liye over-the-counter antihistamine ya mild hydrocortisone cream apply ki ja sakti hai. Scratching se avoid karein.

questions.question: LHR ke baad skin par blisters ya crusting ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.C: Turant medical professional ko consult karein
options.D: Ignore karein, khud theek ho jayega

questions.explanation: Blisters ya crusting serious side effects ho sakte hain. Aisi situation mein turant medical professional ko consult karna chahiye taaki proper treatment mil sake aur infection ya scarring se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: LHR ke baad skin ko moisturize karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Skin ko hydrated rakhne aur healing ko support karne ke liye
options.C: Hair growth ko badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Moisturizing skin ko hydrated rakhta hai, dryness aur irritation ko kam karta hai, aur healing process ko support karta hai.

questions.question: LHR treatment ke dauraan client ke room mein kaun kaun ho sakta hai?

options.D: Client, technician aur ek family member

questions.explanation: Laser safety protocols ke तहत, treatment room mein sirf client aur trained technician ko hi allow kiya jaata hai, aur dono ko proper eye protection pehna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar client ki skin par razor burn ho, toh LHR treatment ka kya karein?

options.B: Razor burn wale area ko avoid karein ya treatment postpone karein

questions.explanation: Razor burn wali skin irritated aur sensitive hoti hai. Aise mein laser apply karne se irritation badh sakti hai. Ya toh us area ko avoid karein ya treatment postpone kar dein jab tak skin heal na ho jaye.

questions.question: LHR ke baad 'purging' kya hota hai?

options.B: Hair follicles se dead hairs ka nikalna

questions.explanation: Purging ya 'shedding' woh process hai jismein laser-treated, dead hairs follicles se bahar nikalte hain. Yeh 1-3 hafte tak chal sakta hai aur normal hai.

questions.question: LHR ke common side effects kya hain?
questions.explanation: LHR ke common aur temporary side effects mein treated area par halki redness, swelling, aur halka discomfort shamil hai, jo kuch ghanton se 1-2 din tak rehta hai.

questions.question: Hyperpigmentation (skin ka dark ho jaana) ka risk kin clients mein zyada hota hai?

options.B: Darker skin types aur sun-tanned skin

questions.explanation: Darker skin types aur tanned skin mein melanin ka level zyada hota hai, jisse laser energy skin mein absorb ho sakti hai aur post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation ka risk badh jaata hai.

questions.question: Hypopigmentation (skin ka light ho jaana) ka matlab kya hai?

options.C: Skin ka surrounding area se light ho jaana

questions.explanation: Hypopigmentation ek side effect hai jismein laser treatment ke baad skin apne natural color se light ho jaati hai, melanin cells ke damage hone ke kaaran. Yeh rarely hota hai.

questions.question: LHR ke liye absolute contraindication kya hai?
questions.explanation: Pregnancy, active infections, aur photosensitizing medications jaise conditions absolute contraindications hain, jahan treatment bilkul nahi karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar client ko active Herpes Simplex (cold sore) outbreak ho, toh LHR ka kya karein?

options.B: Treatment postpone karein jab tak outbreak theek na ho
options.C: Sirf antiviral medicine dekar treatment karein
options.D: Affected area ko avoid karein aur baaki jagah treatment karein

questions.explanation: Active Herpes Simplex outbreak ke dauraan laser treatment karne se virus spread ho sakta hai ya outbreak severe ho sakta hai. Isliye, treatment postpone karna chahiye.

questions.question: Keloid scars history wale client ke liye LHR ka kya risk hai?

options.B: Keloid formation ka risk badh jaata hai
options.D: Hair growth wapas aa sakti hai

questions.explanation: Jin clients ko keloid scars ki history hai, unki skin laser treatment ke baad keloid formation ke prati zyada susceptible ho sakti hai. Isliye, careful assessment aur patch test zaroori hai, ya treatment avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Regulatory bodies LHR practitioners ke liye kya guidelines provide karti hain?

options.B: Training requirements, safety protocols, aur equipment standards

questions.explanation: Regulatory bodies practitioners ki training, equipment safety, aur procedure protocols par guidelines set karti hain taaki client safety aur effective treatment ensure ho sake.

questions.question: Agar client ko LHR ke baad burn ho jaye, toh technician ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Cold compress lagayein aur turant medical help seekhein

questions.explanation: Burn ek serious complication hai. Immediate cooling (cold compress) apply karna chahiye aur turant medical professional ko consult karna chahiye taaki proper treatment aur care mil sake.

questions.question: Photosensitizing drugs par hone wale client ke liye LHR ka kya status hai?

options.B: Relative contraindication, treatment postpone karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Photosensitizing drugs skin ko light ke prati zyada sensitive bana dete hain, jisse burns, blistering, aur hyperpigmentation ka risk badh jaata hai. Aise mein treatment postpone karna hi advisable hai jab tak client medication band na kar de (doctor ki salaah se).

questions.question: Tattoos wale area par LHR kyun nahi karna chahiye?

options.B: Tattoo ink laser energy absorb kar sakta hai, jisse burns aur blisters ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: Tattoo ink mein pigments hote hain jo laser light ko absorb kar sakte hain, jisse skin par severe burns, blisters, aur scarring ho sakti hai, aur tattoo bhi damage ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko epilepsy (mirgi) ho, toh LHR ka kya karein?

options.A: Flashing lights ki wajah se seizure ka risk ho sakta hai, isliye caution ya avoidance

questions.explanation: Laser machines se nikalne wali flashing lights kuch epileptic clients mein seizures trigger kar sakti hain. Isliye, aise clients ke liye treatment avoid karna ya extremely cautious rehna chahiye, aur doctor ki salaah leni chahiye.

questions.question: Informed consent ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client ko sirf treatment ke fayde batana
options.B: Client ko treatment ke risks, benefits, aur alternatives ki poori jaankari dena aur unki marzi lena
options.C: Client ko paise dene ke liye raazi karna

questions.explanation: Informed consent ka matlab hai ki client ko treatment ke baare mein har zaroori jaankari (risks, benefits, alternatives) di gayi hai aur usne poori tarah se samajh kar apni marzi se treatment ke liye haami bhari hai.

questions.question: Para-medical professionals ki supervision mein LHR karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf rules follow karne ke liye
options.B: Complex cases aur emergency situations ko handle karne ke liye
options.D: Machine ko operate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Para-medical professional (jaise doctor ya trained nurse) ki supervision mein LHR karne se complex cases, unexpected side effects, aur medical emergencies ko better manage kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko photosensitive skin condition (jaise Lupus) ho, toh LHR ka kya karein?
questions.explanation: Lupus jaise photosensitive skin conditions wale clients mein laser treatment severe flare-ups, burns, ya skin damage kar sakta hai. Isliye, LHR contraindicated hai.

questions.question: LHR treatment ke baad scarring ka risk kitna hota hai?

options.B: Rare, agar proper protocols follow kiye jayein

questions.explanation: Scarring LHR ka ek rare side effect hai. Yeh usually tab hota hai jab improper settings use ki jaati hain, ya client post-care instructions follow nahi karta, ya agar severe burns ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar client ko treatment ke baad infection ke signs (pus, fever, severe pain) dikhein, toh kya karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Infection ke signs ko serious lena chahiye. Aise mein turant medical professional ko consult karna chahiye taaki proper diagnosis aur treatment mil sake aur complication badhe na.
